title: Track lack of copyright and license headers
description: Track lack of copyright and license headersAnalyze your coderesponsibility-lawfulmaintainabilityCode SmellconventionWhy is this an issue?Each source file should start with a header stating file ownership and the license which must be used to distribute the application.This rule must be fed with the header text that is expected at the beginning of every file.Compliant solution/* * SonarQube, open source software quality management tool. * Copyright (C) 2008-2013 SonarSource * mailto:contact AT sonarsource DOT com * * SonarQube is free software; you can redistribute it and/or * modify it under the terms of the GNU Lesser General Public * License as published by the Free Software Foundation; either * version 3 of the License, or (at your option) any later version. * * SonarQube is distributed
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: File missing copyright and license headers. Add appropriate header at the beginning of the file.
